articles.title: Can’t find Splash Player in the App Store / Amazon Appstore
articles.summary: Splash Player is private, so it won’t appear in public app store search.
articles.body_excerpt: Splash Player is a private, referral-only app and does not appear in public app store searches. Installation is done using the Downloader app and enabling Install Unknown Apps permission.
articles.norm_title: can't find splash player in the app store amazon appstore

articles.title: What Devices Work? (Fire Stick / Google TV) + Why Smart TVs Aren’t Supported
articles.summary: Supported: HDMI streaming devices. Smart TV built-in installs are not supported.
articles.body_excerpt: We support HDMI streaming devices like Fire Stick 4K/4K Max and Google/Android TV streamers. Smart TV built-in systems vary by brand and update unpredictably, causing inconsistent results.
articles.norm_title: what devices work fire stick google tv why smart tvs aren't supported

articles.title: Buffering Even Though Netflix Works (Internet/Wi-Fi Basics)
articles.summary: Netflix adapts automatically; IPTV needs a steady, stable internet connection.
articles.body_excerpt: Netflix adapts video quality automatically. IPTV requires a stable connection. Weak Wi-Fi or network congestion can cause buffering or content not loading.
articles.norm_title: buffering even though netflix works internet wi fi basics

articles.title: What Is Sideloading? (And Yes, It’s Normal)
articles.summary: Sideloading is a normal manual install method for private apps.
articles.body_excerpt: Sideloading means installing an app manually instead of through the public store. Splash Player is private, so Downloader and enabling Install Unknown Apps is required.
articles.norm_title: what is sideloading and yes it's normal

articles.title: Which Downloader Do I Install? (Avoid Clones)
articles.summary: Install the official Downloader app and avoid clones or toolbox apps.
articles.body_excerpt: Install the official Downloader app (orange AFTVNews icon). Avoid clones that push toolboxes or cleaners as they are not part of our setup.
articles.norm_title: which downloader do i install avoid clones

articles.title: Developer Options Missing (Fire Stick / Google TV)
articles.summary: Developer Options are hidden by default; use the 7 taps method to reveal them.
articles.body_excerpt: Developer Options are hidden by default. On Fire Stick or Android TV, go to About and press OK 7 times to reveal Developer Options and enable Install Unknown Apps for Downloader.
articles.norm_title: developer options missing fire stick google tv

articles.title: Installed but Can’t Login Yet (Activation Comes Next)
articles.summary: Installation is step one; activation, payment, and confirmation are step two.
articles.body_excerpt: Installing the app is step one. New subscriptions require payment processing before login details are issued. Attempting login before activation may result in failure.
articles.norm_title: installed but can't login yet activation comes next

articles.title: Invalid Username or Password (Quick Checks)
articles.summary: Usually a typo, old login info, or the account isn’t activated yet.
articles.body_excerpt: Invalid username/password usually means credentials were typed incorrectly, case sensitivity issues, or activation is not complete.
articles.norm_title: invalid username or password quick checks

articles.title: App Opens but Empty (No Channels / No Series Found)
articles.summary: Usually caused by internet stability or a brief connection drop.
articles.body_excerpt: If the app opens but shows no channels, the device may not have a stable internet connection at that moment. Reboot the device and router.
articles.norm_title: app opens but empty no channels no series found

articles.title: How to Pay / Renew (E-Transfer Note Required)
articles.summary: The e-transfer note is required so payments apply correctly without delays.
articles.body_excerpt: Payments are processed by e-transfer. Include your full name and what the payment is for in the message field to prevent processing delays.
articles.norm_title: how to pay renew e transfer note required
